name: Agent Well-Known Readiness Audit

network.purpose: Verify and call production x402/discovery backends documented by the skill.

writes: buyer-selected OpenClaw skills directory when scripts/install_skill.py is run
filesystem.purpose: Optional local install and package verification only.

optional_env: CLAWMART_API_KEY only for seller-side publishing helpers, not buyer runtime
secrets.wallet_private_keys: never read or requested by package scripts

payments.paid_calls_trigger: only when agent/user intentionally follows SKILL workflow against backend endpoints

review_notes: Run scripts/verify_backend.py for unpaid backend and 402-envelope checks.
Pin the zip SHA-256 from artifact-checksums.json when installing in production.
